Implemented: ProjectService.getById, OutputsService.listProjectOutputs, FileService.listProjectFiles. Routes registered in app.ts under /api/platform/projects. 17 new tests pass.

完成项目工作台前端实现: 1) 抽取 SessionChatView 聊天组件, 2) SessionWorkspaceSidebar 添加 projectId prop, 3) 创建 ProjectWorkspacePage (三Tab: 会话/产出/文件), 4) 更新路由配置, 5) SessionWorkspacePage 重构引用 SessionChatView, 6) API 客户端新增 projectOutputs/projectFiles 端点

Added workspaceGeneratedFiles Drizzle schema, migration DDL, truncate cleanup, workspaceFileId id generator, and 7 integration tests (schema regression + route endpoints). Typecheck and all tests pass.

Scaffolded standalone Java CDC worker at services/billing-cdc-worker with Maven, Debezium 3.4.3.Final Embedded Engine, PostgreSQL pgoutput connector, JDBC/file offset storage, application skeleton (config/Main/engine/handler), README with full docs, and 6 passing tests.

Implemented billing accounts ledger, prompt guard, user/admin APIs with 23 passing tests. Added Drizzle schemas, idempotent migrations, BillingService with transaction-safe balance updates, user billing routes, admin billing routes, and minimum-balance blocking on prompt/prompt_async/command endpoints (402 with INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE).

Implemented billing account and ledger UI page. Added BillingAccount/BillingLedgerEntry/BillingPaymentOrder types and API client methods. Added /billing route under MainLayout with clock nav icon. Replaced hardcoded rail credits with live account balance. Built BillingPage with account cards, balance warning, ledger table with filters (entry_type/source_type/media_kind/date), signed amounts display, and manual recharge note. Both web and root typecheck pass.
Completed billing backend, Java CDC worker scaffold, and billing UI slices

Implemented real CDC billing processing: full SessionChangeHandler (parse + skip + delta + resolve account), BillingRepository (HikariCP + atomic JDBC writes + dedup), updated config/engine/README, 11 passing tests.

Audited against compute reference pom.xml. Added missing connect-runtime/connect-file/kafka-clients with slf4j-reload4j exclusions. Confirmed zero Spring deps (no spring-jdbc). Documented Debezium 3.4.3.Final retention rationale. 11 passing tests.

Added component test harness and 17 billing UI tests. Updated test script from placeholder to vitest run. Created BillingPage tests (12 tests: account cards, balance display, loading state, insufficient balance warning, recharge note, signed ledger entries, provider/model display, filter controls, micros formatting). Created MainLayout billing integration tests (5 tests: billing nav item, live balance loading, API failure fallback, unauthenticated state, decimal formatting). Used QLayout+QPageContainer mount helper for Quasar SFC compatibility. Web and root typecheck pass.

Added Playwright E2E billing smoke tests (4 tests pass). Installed @playwright/test, created playwright.config.ts with webServer auto-start and PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER env support. Added test:e2e script. E2E tests mock all API responses via page.route() (no real backend needed), seed auth via addInitScript localStorage, use hash routing (#/billing), and verify: account balance/minimum/credit cards, ledger table entries with entry types/model names, recharge info banner, and filter controls. Prompt blocking E2E deferred (requires full backend+proxy stack). Web and root typecheck pass.

Added backend PATCH /api/admin/billing/accounts/:id endpoint (updateAccountConfig in BillingService) to enable minimum_balance_micros configuration. Created E2E billing-prompt-block.spec.ts with full-stack prompt blocking test that: (1) registers user, (2) admin sets minimum balance above 0 via PATCH, (3) creates session through proxy to OpenCode, (4) expects 402 INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE on prompt POST. Test auto-skips with diagnostic message when backend/OpenCode/admin token are unavailable. All 4 existing E2E smoke tests + 23 backend tests + typecheck pass.

Added 13 ProjectsPage integration tests: mount calls api.listProjects, renders project cards, loading spinner, empty/no-results states, name/description search filtering, card click navigation, dialog opens on 新建项目 click, empty-name guard prevents API call, store.create flows through to api.createProject. Used QLayout wrapper, OiIcon stub, DOMWrapper for teleported QDialog buttons. Documented QInput v-model limitation (QDialog teleport + Quasar events). Web and root typecheck pass.

Renamed PromptsPage to 技能与风格/Skills & Styles. Updated: page title, subtitle, search placeholder, create button, empty states, copy button, dialog title, input label, fallback description. MainLayout nav label changed from Prompt to 技能与风格. Route path /prompts and API method names preserved. Added 2 Vitest component tests verifying new title and dialog wording. Web tests + root typecheck pass.
37 tests pass, typecheck clean: lifecycle, sidebar, child sessions, chat events, generated results, docks, prompt input, pending attention — all covered

PRD created at docs/prd/gallery-home-and-viewer.md covering goals, non-goals, user flows, information architecture, frontend pages, backend API, data model, import flow, submit-to-session flow, mobile, tests, and open questions

Prototype created: GalleryHomePrototype.vue (UILayoutHeader composer + category chips + infinite waterfall) and GalleryDetailPrototype.vue (immersive viewer + keyboard/touch nav + prompt popover/bottomsheet + composer FAB with would-submit feedback). Routes added at /__proto__/gallery-home and /__proto__/gallery/:slug outside MainLayout. Typecheck clean.

Gallery backend implemented: DB model (gallery_works table), GalleryService (list with cursor pagination + category filter, detail with prev/next navigation, importFromManifest with upsert), routes (GET /api/platform/gallery, GET /api/platform/gallery/:slug, POST /api/platform/gallery/import, GET /api/platform/gallery/files/:slug/:filename), all 16 tests passing. Typecheck clean.

AgentPromptInput extended with optional placeholder/hint props, attachments generalized to ComposerAttachment[] (structurally compatible with PendingAttachment[]). 17 new tests covering default/custom placeholder/hint/hide-hint, attachment chips/remove, submit on Enter/button, attach-files, exposed setDraft/focus. Typecheck clean, SessionWorkspacePage unchanged.

Production Gallery frontend: HomePage.vue (UILayout + AgentPromptInput + category chips + infinite waterfall with real API), GalleryDetailPage.vue (immersive viewer with keyboard/touch nav, prompt popover/bottomsheet, composer FAB + session submit), Gallery API client (listGallery/getGalleryItem/sendPrompt with metadata), routes ( / → HomePage, /gallery/:slug → detail), i18n (gallery section), 14 page tests. Typecheck clean. Pre-existing integration test failures unchanged.

Gallery cleanup complete: (1) Removed prototype routes from production routes.ts — __proto__ entries deleted, prototype files kept as throwaway reference not imported by production code. (2) Added docs/gallery-seed-import.md with manifest format, field reference, import commands, and quick-start sample. (3) Field alignment verified — GalleryCard/GalleryDetail frontend types match backend GalleryCardItem/GalleryDetailItem exactly. (4) Quality gates: 16 backend gallery tests pass, 31 frontend Gallery/Home/AgentPromptInput tests pass, both packages typecheck clean. Pre-existing failures: 14 integration tests require backend on port 3000 (unchanged).
Completed: Gallery backend (model/import/API/tests), AgentPromptInput reuse, production HomePage/GalleryDetailPage, prototype route cleanup, seed import docs, and focused quality gates all completed.
